title: Aqua Combat
description: Compatibility between all weapons in Aquamirae and Better Combat!
body:
Compatibility between all weapons in Aquamirae and Better Combat!

 

Coral Lance and Sweet Lance gain spear type moves.

The Dagger of Greed and Divider gain the dagger type moves.

The Fin Cutter, Poisioned Blade, and Terrible Sword gain sword type moves.

The Remnant's Saber gains cutlass type moves.

The Whisper of The Abyss gains Battle Staff type moves.

 

Requires Aquamirae and Better Combat
